Definition: Minimal medication treatment line payload for use within a QR code payload. Based on the IHE Pharmacy Medication Treatment Line logical model, with short element labels (one or two letters) and simple data types suitable for encoding in a compact QR code payload.
Start date during which the medication treatment line is effective.
End date during which the medication treatment line is effective.
Date the medication treatment line was asserted/recorded.
Reason why the product has been prescribed.
Status of patient adherence to the medication treatment line
